description: Ecuadorian narcoterrorist and criminal organization specializing in drug trafficking, extortion, kidnapping, and murder. It split from Los Choneros in 2021 after the assassination of Los Choneros leader Jorge Luís Zambrano. Originating in Esmeraldas, it expanded to Guayaquil and Manta. The group gained notoriety for a violent takeover of TC Televisión in 2024.
